title: PakTiers
description: A Minecraft Fabric Mod For Tier Tracking
body:
# PakTier
The official nametag-tiering mod!

This mod is officially supported by **paktiers.xyz**

Icon by **AzlanPLayz**

---

## 📛 About PakTier

**PakTier** is a mod that displays a player's **PvP Tier directly in their nametag**.

PakTier supports **all 8 PakTiers game modes**.  

- The **default gamemode** shown in the nametag is configurable  
- If a player is **unranked** in the selected gamemode, PakTier will automatically display their **highest tier overall**

---

## 🧍 Nametag Showcase

PakTier dynamically updates player nametags to reflect their current tier in supported PvP modes.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5132333bf807fdab2e1c1edbeb7a8f10aefbb7_0.webp)
---

## 👤 Player Profile

PakTier includes a **built-in profile viewer** that allows players to view detailed tier information for themselves and others.

---

## 🧱 Minecraft Version Support

**Currently supported versions:**
- Minecraft **1.21 → 1.21.11**

**Future version support:**
Once Mojang switches to the new versioning system next year, the **last 4 minor releases** will be supported.

During the transition phase (until **26.4**):
- **1.21.1**
- **1.21.11**

will remain supported.
